subcodes.first_line: May my soul be a sacrifice unto Thee, O Thou Who hast arisen to aid the Cause of God! May my spirit be offered up for Thee, inasmuch as Thou art perfumed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفسی لک الفداء یا من قمت علی نصرة الله روحی لک الفداء بما تعطر
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @da'iras and haykals
